title: Saudian Skillet Chicken and Tomatoes
description: A flavorful and spicy dish from Saudi Arabia, made with chicken, tomatoes, and Arabian spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the onion and garlic to the skillet.
Cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cumin, tomato paste, and cherry tomatoes to the skillet.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
